title: helichrysum stilpnocephalum
intro: Helichrysum stilpnocephalum, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing pain and inflammation, and protecting against cell damage. The health benefits of Helichrysum stilpnocephalum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and support immune function, while also exhibiting anti-cancer and anti-bacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum stilpnocephalum include essential oils, teas, and capsules, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
